use_case: Vision-language model for image captioning and visual question answering
notes: 3B parameter model combining SigLIP vision encoder with Gemma 2B language decoder. Accepts 224x224 images and generates text captions or answers to visual questions.
quick_start:
from transformers import AutoProcessor, PaliGemmaForConditionalGeneration
from PIL import Image
processor = AutoProcessor.from_pretrained('google/paligemma-3b-pt-224')
model = PaliGemmaForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained('google/paligemma-3b-pt-224', torch_dtype='auto', device_map='auto')
image = Image.open('photo.jpg')
inputs = processor(text='caption en', images=image, return_tensors='pt').to(model.device)

use_case: Image captioning and visual understanding with Q-Former bridge
notes: BLIP-2 architecture using a frozen OPT-2.7B language model with a trainable Q-Former bridge. Strong zero-shot image captioning but slower than PaliGemma due to Q-Former overhead.
quick_start:
from transformers import Blip2Processor, Blip2ForConditionalGeneration
from PIL import Image
processor = Blip2Processor.from_pretrained('Salesforce/blip2-opt-2.7b')
model = Blip2ForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained('Salesforce/blip2-opt-2.7b', torch_dtype='auto', device_map='auto')
image = Image.open('photo.jpg')
inputs = processor(images=image, return_tensors='pt').to(model.device)
